profile.name: Harish R
profile.tagline: I build AI products — not just models.
profile.summary: AI/ML Product Developer working at the intersection of AI development and product thinking — taking ideas from concept to production-ready platform. I've shipped full AI platforms end-to-end: architecting backends, integrating LLMs, building agentic workflows, and deploying production infrastructure. From autonomous AI agents to enterprise observability and security platforms, I own the entire build. I design systems that are technically solid, user-facing, and built to scale. I don't ship demos — I ship products.

highlights: Building AI agent systems using the MCP (Multi Agent Protocol) framework.
Developing end-to-end AI solutions from data and models to deployment.
Working with LLMs and agentic workflows to automate complex tasks.
Designing AI-powered product features using LangChain.
Implementing AI governance practices for responsible model usage.
Building and integrating LLM-based pipelines into production workflows.
Developed an Education Portal web application with secure authentication.
Built a responsive frontend with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Developed backend APIs using Node.js and Express.js.
Worked on data analysis and reporting tasks using Python-based tools.
Performed data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis.
Generated insights and reports to support decision-making.
Developed a job recommendation system using content-based and collaborative filtering.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Applied Python and deep learning techniques to improve recommendation relevance.
Analyzed user behavior and skill similarity to personalize results.

projects.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) AI Chatbot
projects.description: A RAG-based AI chatbot that retrieves relevant information from external data sources and generates context-aware responses using Large Language Models. Built with a Node.js and Express backend and a responsive HTML/CSS frontend, with VectorShift pipelines handling document retrieval, embedding-based search, and response generation so users can query documents and receive accurate, grounded answers.

projects.title: Hey Voice — Voice Assistant for Classroom
projects.description: A smart classroom assistant that lets teachers and students interact with a computer system using voice commands. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and a database, it performs various tasks through voice input and facial recognition.

projects.title: Job Recommendation System
projects.description: A job recommendation system using NLP & ML that suggests similar job roles for a given title. Cleaned and preprocessed 84,000+ job listings with tokenization, stopword removal, stemming, and TF-IDF vectorization, then built a content-based recommendation engine using cosine similarity over combined job fields. Trained models were serialized with Pickle for reuse.

education.institution: Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering & Technology
